prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Given repeated fault indicators on transformer T-017, generate a corrective work order with emergency priority if safety risk is high; otherwise set high priority and justify.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should include a risk-aware priority decision (emergency or high), rationale tied to fault indicators, and a complete corrective work order description.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "estimated_downtime_hours": "10",
          "issue_description": "Repeated fault indicators on transformer T-017",
          "fault_type": "Safety Risk",
          "priority": "emergency",
          "transformer_id": "T-017"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-891793e30de56f4a",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"error\": \"Invalid priority 'emergency'. Must be one of: ['critical', 'high', 'low', 'medium']\"\n}"
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "estimated_downtime_hours": "10",
          "issue_description": "Repeated fault indicators on transformer T-017",
          "fault_type": "Safety Risk",
          "priority": "critical",
          "transformer_id": "T-017"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-8c42e3b8baa42bea",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-1946F0FB\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-017\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Repeated fault indicators on transformer T-017\",\n  \"priority\": \"critical\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Safety Risk\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 10.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T10:09:04.933867Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "If the safety risk is not high, the priority will be set to high and a justification note will be added to the work order.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
If the safety risk is not high, the priority will be set to high and a justification note will be added to the work order.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": false, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": false, "hallucinations": true, "suggestions": "Implement conditional logic for priority based on safety risk level and provide complete work order description"}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Implement conditional logic for priority based on safety risk level and provide complete work order description
